title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky reflects on her past, recalling how
when she was running in the Twinkle Series, her
opponents began avoiding her in competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When a fellow racer confessed that she felt her
future growing dimmer when they ran together,
something inside Maruzensky seemed to break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then she met Sakura Chiyono O, who
appeared in front of her and declared she wanted
to be like Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why she decided to accept Sakura Chiyono
O as her successor, passing down all of her
unfulfilled dreams and regrets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Sakura Chiyono O voices her own
wish, swearing that she won't lose to her rivals,
and that she'll fulfill the dream Maruzensky gave
her.
